features.name: Home Step Counter
features.description: Add a step counter to the Home page that increments with a +1 button and resets to zero with a Reset button.
features.evidence: docs/harness/specs/home-counter/ defines the reviewable spec, ui-map delta, and Maestro-only UI acceptance checklist; .maestro/android and .maestro/ios contain the executable home_counter_flow; lib/features/home/presentation/bloc contains HomeCounterBloc event/state logic with 100% test coverage; lib/features/home/presentation/pages/home_page.dart renders the BLoC state with Semantics identifiers; fvm flutter test test/features/home/presentation/bloc/home_counter_bloc_test.dart passes; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart check passes with all logic/data/BLoC/network/harness tests; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart spec accept home-counter --maestro reports PASS on iOS; docs/harness/evidence/home-counter/report.json is committed evidence.
